arts.ttl: Leeds United suggest major Elland Road changes in near future through fan questionnaire
arts.sum: The 49ers have made their intentions clear on expanding Elland Road in the near future, confirming plans for the club to redevelop both the West Stand and North Stand. A questionnaire has been sent out from Leeds United to supporters this week in order to provide important input on the upcoming Elland Road expansion.

arts.ttl: Leeds United target 33-year-old as Cheikhou Kouyate alternative
arts.sum: Leeds United are sizing up Francis Coquelin as a potential free agent addition, a new report from The… The post Leeds United target 33-year-old as Cheikhou Kouyate alternative appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United starting pistol fired on Thorp Arch's Squid Game for new midfielder
arts.sum: A starting pistol on Leeds United’s search for a free agent was fired by Daniel Farke yesterday, setting in motion what everyone needs: a third deadline day of the year. “If you make a decision right now, pretty quickly, I spoke about the profile, that is important, but also perhaps behind closed doors potential candidates are already working a little bit on their fitness level and being back for proper team training.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Private jet hired for Aaronson to jet to UK
arts.sum: Leeds United attacking midfielder Brenden Aaronson was in action in the early hours of Wednesday morning for the USMNT, and faces a race against time to be fit for Friday’s clash with Sheffield United. Two friendlies against Panama and Mexico was what awaited Brenden Aaronson on USMNT duty, and he was given a start in both of Mauricio Pochettino’s opening two games in charge.

arts.ttl: Real Betis plotting move for 'high quality' Leeds United star as contract winds down
arts.sum: Leeds United full-back Junior Firpo is a target for La Liga side Real Betis according to reports in Spain. The left-back has been a mainstay in Daniel Farke's starting XI since the German arrived at Elland Road, with Firpo a consistent performer so far this season.

arts.ttl: ‘Going to be disappointed’ – Leeds United vs Sheffield United prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Leeds United vs Sheffield United prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday night. The post ‘Going to be disappointed’ – Leeds United vs Sheffield United prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 33-y/o ex-PL star invited to Leeds United training, deal could be done within 14 days
arts.sum: Leeds United have reportedly invited Francis Coquelin to train with the club this week as they bid to resolve their midfield injury crisis. Daniel Farke has a unique selection headache at the moment when looking at his Leeds squad, with his two senior defensive midfielders both out for the foreseeable with knee injury.

arts.ttl: 3 free agent centre-backs Leeds United must consider amid Daniel Farke’s transfer hint
arts.sum: Leeds United have been on the lookout for a free agent defensive midfielder, but Daniel Farke suggests it’s… The post 3 free agent centre-backs Leeds United must consider amid Daniel Farke’s transfer hint appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's six-year problem still needs years and tens of millions of pounds to solve
arts.sum: Four current Premier League stadiums are not big enough to even fit the entirety of Leeds United’s season ticket waiting list in their seats. The opportunity for people on the season ticket waiting list to get a seat is going to be when the new stands are built and then we can get the visibility.

arts.ttl: 'Suffering' Meslier's reaction to gaffe decides Leeds United selection on Friday
arts.sum: Meslier, Farke said, had a few days to mull over the gaffe, but, like any experienced professional, dusted himself off and looked to the future before the end of last week. Selection between the sticks will not be on the agenda for Daniel Farke as Leeds United look to bounce back from Illan Meslier’s personal disappointment in Sunderland.
